headline: 3 Reasons DRI is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Darden has followed the market’s trajectory closely, rising in tandem with the S&P 500 over the past six months. The stock has climbed by 13.6% to $203.63 per share while the index has gained 10%.
